news.summary: Xtract One has released financial results for the Third Quarter of Fiscal 2025. The company reports that its total backlog continues to be at all-time high levels, indicating strong demand for its services. This positions Xtract One favorably for future growth opportunities.
news.headline: Xtract One's Q3 FY2025 results show record backlog, signaling strong growth potential.

news.summary: Winna, a new crypto gambling platform, is gaining popularity for its fast crypto payouts, privacy-focused onboarding, and emphasis on esports betting. Launched in 2024, Winna holds Tobique Gaming License and offers over 2,000 games, accepting various cryptocurrencies like BTC, ETH, and DOGE. With an average withdrawal time of under 10 minutes and no KYC verification required for crypto users, Winna stands out for its speed, privacy, and personalized rewards. It has received praise for its fast withdrawals, high-quality game library, crypto-friendly promotions, and 24/7 customer support. This new player in the market is positioning itself as a top choice for modern crypto-native gamblers.
news.headline: Winna is a top crypto casino focusing on speed, privacy, and esports betting with 2,000+ games. Offers sub-10 min withdrawals and no KYC. Rated as the best crypto casino for modern players.

news.summary: ZJK Industrial Co., Ltd. from Shenzhen, China, has informed journalists and readers to ignore a news release stating the company was increasing production to assist Nvidia's B40 Project, anticipating notable year-over-year revenue growth. The release was published on June 5, 2025, at 08:00 AM EDT via GlobeNewswire.
news.headline: Disregard news release by ZJK Industrial Co., Ltd. on ramping up production for Nvidia's B40 Project for revenue growth.
broadcom expects fiscal year 25 artificial intelligence chip sales growth to continue into year on year 26

news.summary: In the latest earnings report, Vail Resorts Inc (NYSE: MTN) shared their financial performance for the third quarter. Revenues for Q3 stood at $1.29 billion, slightly below the expected $1.3 billion. Earnings per share for the quarter were reported at $10.54, surpassing the estimated $10.12 per share. The total revenue showed a 1% increase compared to the previous year. Pass product sales for the 2025/2026 North American ski season saw a 1% decrease in units, but a 2% increase in sales dollars. The board of Vail Resorts announced a quarterly cash dividend of $2.22 per share, set to be paid on July 9 for shareholders of record as of June 24.
news.headline: Vail Resorts reports Q3 revenue of $1.29B, EPS of $10.54, misses sales estimates but targets $100M cost efficiencies.

news.summary: In Sheboygan, Wisconsin on June 5, 2025, Dr. Jeremy A. Scarlett gained recognition as a distinguished member of The Inner Circle, being honored as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for his work in Advancing Interventional Pain Management. Dr. Scarlett, highly regarded in his field, has been acknowledged for his significant contributions.
news.headline: Dr. Jeremy A. Scarlett recognized as Pinnacle Professional Member by The Inner Circle for contributions to Pain Management.

news.summary: Enghouse Systems Limited reported their second quarter financial results for the period ending April 30, 2025. Revenue decreased by 0.8% to $124.8 million in Q2 2025 compared to $125.8 million in Q2 2024, and increased by 1.0% to $248.8 million for the six-month period compared to $246.3 million last year. Recurring revenue, including SaaS and maintenance services, increased by 1.4% to $86.2 million in Q2 2025. Results from operating activities decreased to $25.1 million in Q2 2025 from $33.5 million in Q2 2024. Net income was $13.5 million in Q2 2025 compared to $20.0 million in Q2 2024, and $35.4 million year to date compared to $38.1 million last year. Adjusted EBITDA decreased to $28.6 million in Q2 2025 from $35.7 million in Q2 2024, and year to date Adjusted EBITDA was $61.7 million compared to $70.4 million in the prior year. Cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments were $263.5 million as of April 30, 2025. Enghouse also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per common share payable on August 29, 2025. Enghouse remains focused on operational discipline and strategic acquisitions to drive future growth.
news.headline: Enghouse Systems Limited announces Q2 financial results: Revenue $124.8M (↓0.8% YoY), net income $13.5M (↓32.6% YoY), Adjusted EBITDA $28.6M (↓22.9%). Strategic acquisitions and dividends approved.

news.summary: The company is moving forward with its ambitious plans utilizing a Bitcoin treasury strategy. Through this approach, the company aims to capitalize on the potential of the cryptocurrency. Additionally, the company announced its intention to leverage a universal shelf for further strategic opportunities. This development signifies a significant shift in the company's financial strategy. The exact amount of Bitcoin involved and the specifics of the universal shelf remain undisclosed at this time.
news.headline: Trump Media files S-3 for Bitcoin Treasury deal, advancing ambitious plans with universal shelf strategy.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Toronto, Firm Capital Apartment REIT announced that during the annual and special meeting for unitholders, all trustee nominees were successfully elected as trustees of the Trust. The Trust is listed as FCA.U and FCA on the TSX Venture Exchange. This news signifies a positive outcome for the Trust and ensures continuity in its governance structure moving forward.
news.headline: Firm Capital Apartment REIT holds annual meeting, all trustee nominees elected; pleased to announce results.

news.summary: She made history as the initial female member of the White House Council of Economic Advisers. During her tenure at General Motors, she achieved one of the highest positions held by a woman in the corporate sphere.
news.headline: Trade expert, Marina von Neumann Whitman, first woman in White House Council of Economic Advisers, dies at age 90. Highest-ranking woman at General Motors.

news.summary: Centerra Gold Inc. has released its 2024 Sustainability Report, revealing its progress in Environmental, Social and Governance (ESG) areas. The report, now available on Centerra's website at www.centerragold.com/sustainability/overview/, showcases the company's advancements and accomplishments. Investors can find more detailed information on Centerra's ESG performance by visiting the mentioned website. The Company, indicated by stock symbols TSX: CG and NYSE: CGAU, continues to focus on sustainability practices and ensuring accountability across all facets of its operations.
news.headline: Centerra Gold releases 2024 Sustainability Report, addressing ESG topics. Access full report at www.centerragold.com/sustainability/overview/.

news.summary: On June 2, 2025, Anika Therapeutics, Inc. granted non-statutory Options for 2,500 shares of common stock at $11.45 per share, equivalent to the Closing Price on Nasdaq. The grant, part of the 2021 Inducement Plan, aimed to attract a newly hired non-executive employee. This decision followed approval by the compensation committee of the board of directors under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Anika focuses on early intervention orthopedics in the osteoarthritis pain management and regenerative solutions sectors.
news.headline: Anika granted 2,500 shares of stock options at $11.45/share on June 2, 2025, to a new employee as an inducement.

news.summary: Toronto-based real estate investment firm, Firm Capital Property Trust, disclosed the outcomes of their Annual and Special Meeting of unitholders on June 5, 2025. The Trust, listed as FCD.UN on the TSX, reported on the voting results from the meeting where holders of Trust Units participated. The event, which took place in Toronto, saw the shareholders cast their votes on key matters.
news.headline: Firm Capital Property Trust reports voting results from annual meeting of unitholders on June 5, 2025. TSX: FCD.UN.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, VEON Ltd. (Nasdaq: VEON) disclosed the registration of a Form F-4 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to list Kyivstar Group Ltd. on the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. Kyivstar Group is the parent entity of JSC Kyivstar, Ukraine's prominent digital operator, emphasizing its growing presence in the industry. This move signifies a strategic development in the global digital market, demonstrating significant advancement in the sector.
news.headline: VEON files registration statement for Kyivstar Group's Nasdaq listing, parent company of JSC Kyivstar.

news.summary: Southwest Airlines Co. has significantly increased its presence in Denver by expanding its Cargo facility at Denver International Airport. The grand opening of the facility took place on June 5, 2025. This move is in line with the airline's long-term strategy and vision for growth. The new facility almost doubles Southwest Cargo's footprint in Denver, emphasizing the company's commitment to enhancing its operations. Southwest Airlines Co., listed on the NYSE as LUV, aims to capitalize on the expanded space to better serve its cargo operations and meet increasing demand.
news.headline: Southwest Airlines Cargo opens new facility at Denver International Airport, nearly doubling its footprint. #DenverGrowth

news.summary: In Kyiv, Ukraine, on June 5, 2025, Kyivstar Group, the top digital operator in Ukraine and a subsidiary of VEON Ltd. (Nasdaq: VEON), revealed its unaudited financial and operational performance for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025.
news.headline: Kyivstar Group announces Q1 2025 results in conjunction with Nasdaq listing process; subsidiary of VEON Ltd.

news.summary: Montreal, June 5, 2025 - Saputo Inc. (TSX: SAP) released financial figures for the quarter and fiscal year concluding on March 31, 2025. The data is expressed in millions of Canadian dollars (CDN), except for per share values, unless specified otherwise, and adheres to International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS).
news.headline: Saputo (TSX: SAP) reported Q4 and FY25 results, all figures in CAD millions, ending March 31, 2025, as per IFRS standards.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, IAC Inc. made public that its subsidiary, Dotdash Meredith Inc. (DDM), will be selling $400 million in senior secured notes due 2032. This private offering will involve 7.625% interest on the aggregate principal amount of the Notes.
news.headline: IAC Inc. subsidiary Dotdash Meredith to sell $400 million senior secured notes due 2032 in private offering.

news.summary: Genpact (NYSE: G), a global company specializing in advanced technology services and solutions, is set to accelerate its expansion through a recent partnership. This collaboration will enhance Genpact's data and AI capabilities, domain expertise, and strategic partnerships. The partnership was announced in New York on June 5, 2025.
news.headline: Genpact (NYSE: G) acquires XponentL Data to boost data and AI capabilities, accelerate innovation and expand advanced technology solutions.

news.summary: A recent report indicates that the number of COVID-19 cases in the country has reached 200,000, with over 5,000 new cases reported in the last 24 hours. The death toll has surpassed 4,000, with 100 new fatalities recorded today. The government has implemented stricter measures to curb the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing and limitations on public gatherings. Hospitals are reportedly reaching capacity, with 80% of ICU beds currently occupied. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to health guidelines to prevent further escalation of the crisis.

news.summary: Navient, a company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol NAVI, conducted its 2025 Annual Meeting of Shareholders in Herndon, Virginia on June 5th. Shareholders voted to approve three proposals as suggested by the board of directors. This included electing seven nominees to the board. The meeting signals the continuation of Navient’s corporate governance and strategic decision-making process as per the outcomes of the annual gathering.
news.headline: Navient's 2025 shareholder meeting elects Edward Bramson as board chair, approves 7 nominees as directors.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in San Diego, Boundless Bio revealed that their President and CEO, Zachary Hornby, will be engaging in a fireside chat at the Goldman Sachs 46th Annual Global Healthcare Conference. Boundless Bio, listed as Nasdaq: BOLD, is a company in the clinical-stage oncology sector that explores extrachromosomal DNA (ecDNA) biology to provide groundbreaking therapies for patients dealing with challenging oncogene amplified cancers. This announcement signifies Boundless Bio's active involvement in industry events and their commitment to advancing innovative healthcare solutions.
news.headline: Boundless Bio (Nasdaq: BOLD) will participate in Goldman Sachs 46th Annual Global Healthcare Conference. CEO to speak.

news.summary: On Thursday, the Nasdaq experienced the most significant decline among major indexes. Palantir saw a notable decrease in its stock value. Today, stock market indexes are predominantly in the red, with Tesla facing a significant drop in value.
news.headline: Stock market declines across all indexes; Tesla stock drops, Nasdaq performs worst on Thursday.

news.summary: Stock market indexes experienced a decline as a result of the Elon Musk-President Trump feud, leading to a significant drop in Tesla's stock. Late earnings reports were led by Broadcom. Dow Jones Futures displayed a bearish trend with stocks falling and Tesla experiencing a crash. Additionally, Broadcom faced a decline in late trading.

news.summary: In the latest fiscal quarter, Broadcom slightly surpassed Wall Street's expectations, both in terms of financial performance and guidance. Despite this positive outcome, the company's stock experienced a decline during after-hours trading.

news.summary: Shares of Samsara experienced a decline following the release of their first-quarter financial results. The company surpassed Wall Street expectations in both earnings and revenue, however, their revenue guidance for the upcoming July quarter fell slightly short of projections. This led to a decrease in share prices as investors reacted to the mixed performance.
news.headline: Samsara beats Q1 earnings, revenue but disappoints with guidance. Shares fall post-report.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, in Middletown, New York, a former Chief of Police, William Herlihy, transitioned into a new role donning scrubs. Earlier in February 2025, Herlihy, also known as Bill, made public his retirement as the police chief for the Villages of Montgomery and Walden in New York.
news.headline: Former NY Police Chief Bill Herlihy transitions to iCRYO franchise owner post-retirement in 2025.

news.summary: Rubrik, Inc. (NYSE: RBRK) announced its first-quarter results after the market closed on Thursday. The report revealed that the company experienced losses of 15 cents per share, surpassing the analyst consensus prediction of losses totaling 32 cents per share. Additionally, quarterly revenue reached $278.48 million, exceeding the Street's estimate of $260.35 million. In terms of performance, Rubrik observed growth in Subscription Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) for the first quarter. For more details on this news, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Rubrik, Inc. (NYSE: RBRK) shares rise on stronger Q1 results, exceeding expectations. Losses were 15 cents/share, revenue $278.48 million.ARA up.

news.summary: In Kansas City, Missouri, on June 5, 2025, NASB Financial, Inc. (OTCQX: NASB) disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.25 per share. This dividend is scheduled for payment on June 27, 2025, to shareholders listed on the records as of June 16, 2025. NASB Financial, Inc. is a...
news.headline: NASB Financial, Inc. declares a $0.25 quarterly cash dividend per share, to be paid on June 27, 2025, to stockholders.

news.summary: Bunker Hill Mining Corp. has successfully closed two private placements, raising a total of approximately US$31.1 million. The first placement, the Brokered Private Placement, consisted of cash consideration of about US$6.2 million and debt settlement of around US$4.4 million, totaling 40,726,231 units. The second placement, the Teck Private Placement, involved Teck Resources Limited investing approximately US$20.5 million for 252,215,751 units at a price of C$0.15 per unit. The Equity Offerings saw Teck acquiring 195,294,655 units and a syndicate of agents acquiring 56,921,096 units, with Sprott Streaming acquiring 10,000,000 units.
news.headline: Bunker Hill closes $31M in equity financings and debt settlements, including $6.2M cash & $4.4M debt. Teck Resources contributes $20.5M.

news.summary: In Watsonville, California, Granite has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.13 per common share (NYSE:GVA). This dividend will be paid on July 15, 2025, to all shareholders of record as of June 30, 2025. Established in 1922, Granite is recognized as one of the leading diversified construction and construction materials firms in the U.S. under the symbol NYSE:GVA.
news.headline: Granite declares $0.13 quarterly dividend for shareholders of record by June 30, payable on July 15, 2025. #GVA #NYSE

news.summary: In Houston on June 5, 2025, Nauticus Robotics, Inc. (NASDAQ: KITT), a prominent player in autonomous subsea robotics and software solutions, revealed a significant partnership with Open Ocean Robotics, a trailblazer in uncrewed surface vehicles (USVs). This collaboration is aimed at enhancing their capabilities in the field, combining Nauticus Robotics’ expertise in subsea robotics with Open Ocean Robotics' proficiency in USVs. The move is indicative of the growing trend towards autonomous technology in the maritime industry. The partnership is expected to drive innovation and safety in underwater operations, leveraging the strengths of both companies. It marks a strategic step towards advancing the development of autonomous solutions for subsea environments. This collaboration underscores the commitment of both companies to stay at the forefront of technological advancements. The partnership between Nauticus Robotics, Inc. and Open Ocean Robotics signifies a significant milestone in the autonomous maritime technology sector, promising to revolutionize operations in subsea exploration and beyond.
news.headline: Nauticus Robotics collaborates with Open Ocean Robotics to transform subsea asset management using innovative technology.

news.summary: Orano has established a new office in Oak Ridge with a team of 40 employees to drive the development of their multibillion-dollar uranium enrichment facility on formerly Manhattan Project-owned land. The company's expansion in OAK RIDGE, Tenn was announced on June 5, 2025. In collaboration with over 100 stakeholders from federal, state, business, and regional sectors, Orano is making significant progress towards their goal.
news.headline: Orano opens 40-person office in Oak Ridge to develop multibillion-dollar uranium enrichment facility on Manhattan Project property.

news.summary: Broadcom Inc (NASDAQ: AVGO) released their Q2 financial results with revenue reaching $15 billion, surpassing analyst predictions of $14.99 billion. The company reported adjusted earnings of $1.58 per share, exceeding estimates of $1.56 per share. Their total revenue increased by 20% year-over-year due to strong performance in AI semiconductor solutions and VMware. Broadcom saw $6.56 billion in cash from operations and $6.41 billion in free cash flow during this period.
news.headline: Broadcom Q2 earnings beat estimates with revenue of $15 billion, EPS at $1.58/share. AI networking drives growth.

news.summary: Los Angeles-based cybersecurity firm Resecurity will be participating in the Police Technology Summit 2025 on June 5-6, 2025, at Rashtriya Raksha University (RRU) in Gandhinagar, Gujarat, India. The summit, organized by the Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India, aims to promote innovation and collaboration in law enforcement and public safety.
news.headline: Resecurity to exhibit at Police Technology Summit 2025 in India on June 5-6 organized by Ministry of Home Affairs.

news.summary: On June 5, 2025, Lee Enterprises announced a data security breach in Davenport, Iowa. The incident potentially compromised personal information of community members. Lee emphasizes its commitment to safeguarding all data and ensuring privacy. Residents are advised to review details of the breach for further information.
news.headline: Lee Enterprises informs about data breach in Davenport, Iowa on June 5, 2025, impacting personal information.

news.summary: Samsara, Inc. (NYSE: IOT) unveiled their Q1 results after Thursday's market close. The company exceeded expectations with adjusted earnings of 11 cents per share, surpassing the estimated six cents. Quarterly revenue stood at $366.9 million, outperforming the Street's projection of $351.42 million. To read more details, check out the complete story on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Samsara stocks dip despite exceeding Q1 expectations. Reported earnings: $0.11/share (est. $0.06/share), revenue: $366.9M (est. $351.42M)
